response.justification: Bogdan Szabo demonstrates strong software development skills and leadership in diverse technical environments, but his experience does not fully align with the core requirements of the Technical Lead — Cloud Compute Platform role, particularly in C++ and large-scale distributed systems infrastructure.
strengths: Extensive experience in full-stack development and technical leadership across multiple domains (web, mobile, desktop, embedded).
Proven track record of mentoring, knowledge sharing, and establishing engineering best practices (e.g., TDD, CI/CD, trunk-based development).
Strong open-source contributions and hands-on experience with cloud technologies (AWS, Kubernetes) and DevOps practices.
concerns: Lacks the required 8 years of C++ experience, with only limited exposure (e.g., National Instruments role).
Experience in large-scale distributed systems and compute infrastructure is not clearly demonstrated in the resume.
Technical leadership roles have been more focused on full-stack and product development rather than cloud compute platforms or infrastructure.
